core_mechanism: an iterative closed-loop feedback/control scheme that alternates short forward time-evolution with an optimization step projecting the state back onto a constrained low-dimensional invariant manifold, thereby stabilizing otherwise unstable or marginal trajectories (a control-of-chaos / repeated-manifold-projection stabilization loop)
brief_reason: The abstract states that each iteration combines short-time evolution with classical optimization that projects the dynamics back onto a low-entanglement variational manifold to autonomously discover and stabilize long-lived regular trajectories amid chaotic evolution.
